title: eriogonella spinosa
intro: Eriogonella spinosa, also known as Spiny Desert Willow, is a type of flowering plant native to the deserts of Western Australia. It is a shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonella spinosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for use in herbal remedies.
